title: Accounts & sign-in
body: Email code sign-in, Google sign-in, and passkey support. No passwords, and no confusing magic links.

title: Stats tracking
body: Every solved puzzle records your time, mistakes, and hints used — see it all on the Stats page.

title: Teams
body: Create a team, join as many as you like, add other players, or leave any time. Private profiles can't be added by anyone but themselves.

title: Challenge mode
body: One attempt per puzzle per day, the exact same puzzle for everyone, locked to real calendar dates. Miss a day? You can still catch it up later — still just one shot.

title: Mood status
body: Set a short status next to your name, visible to everyone.

title: Post-puzzle difficulty rating
body: Tap a bar right after solving to say how hard it felt. See the group's average difficulty before you even start a puzzle.

title: Feedback board
body: Suggest ideas, upvote other people's. Admin can mark things done with a comment.

title: Who's online
body: See who else currently has the app open and what they're playing. Tap someone to send them a fun poke.

title: Renamed to I'mBoredToday
body: New name, new playful font across the whole app.

title: Fixed mistake counting in Tango
body: Mistakes now only count when Hint actually catches something wrong — not on every tap. Matches how Queens already worked.

title: Nicer button hover/press effects
body: Every nav icon now has a springy lift on hover and a satisfying press on tap, each in its own accent color.

title: Difficulty rating redesigned
body: Switched from a tap-anywhere triangle to discrete tappable bars, matching watchOS's effort rating pattern.

title: Feedback form simplified
body: Down to a single text box instead of separate title and description fields.

title: Admin: hide a player
body: Admin can make a player invisible to everyone but themselves, enforced by the database itself, not just the UI.

title: Online widget redesign
body: Moved next to your profile, wiggles when others are online, expands into a list you can tap to poke someone.

title: Nav menu collapsed into one button
body: Profile, Feedback, Stats, Teams, and Sign out now live behind a single avatar button instead of cluttering the top bar.

title: Fixed missing Home buttons
body: Teams, Stats, Feedback, Profile, and the Challenge screen all had a barely-visible back arrow — replaced with a clear, labeled Home button everywhere.

title: Feedback notification badge
body: The nav button now wiggles with a purple count badge whenever there's open feedback waiting to be reviewed.

title: Fixed online status
body: You now show as online for the whole time the app is open, not just while mid-puzzle.

title: Fixed a login-breaking bug
body: A database policy had an infinite recursion bug that could block sign-in entirely. Fixed at the database level.

title: This page
body: Release notes are now fully automatic, synced from a changelog file on every deploy — nobody types these in by hand.

title: Release notes cleanup
body: Removed manual post/delete controls (the changelog file is the single source of truth now) and added version numbers to every entry.

title: Stats split by Challenge/Practice
body: Toggle between the two — practice is unlimited so its counts aren't really comparable, challenge is the fair one-shot-a-day metric. Each game shown separately, plus a total.

title: Fixed the mystery hide button
body: Admin's player-hide toggle only had a hover tooltip, which does nothing on a phone. Now has a visible text label.

title: Fixed release notes not updating
body: The sync used 'ignore-duplicates', which skips any entry that already exists instead of updating it. Switched to 'merge-duplicates' so edits to CHANGELOG.json actually take effect on already-synced entries.

title: Fixed missing Home button on the Solved! screen
body: The post-puzzle rating screen (challenge and practice mode both) had no way back to Home at all — only its own continue button. Added a back arrow, top-left.

title: New game: Mini Sudoku
body: 6x6 sudoku, verified unique every time, difficulty scales through the week via clue count. Hint uses real solving techniques (naked/hidden singles, contradiction test) — never a guess. Works in both Challenge and Practice mode, same as the others. Also brought Queens/Tango/Zip's fonts in line with the rest of the app.

title: New admin screen: Players
body: Lists every signed-up player, not just ones who've played something (unlike Stats' hide toggle, which only shows players with game history). Admin-only, hide/unhide from here.
